underlying_goal: Identify and fix the source of recurring write hook / pretool use errors in Claude Code
friction_detail: Claude initially assumed the project-level hooks were outdated duplicates of the global ones and recommended treating it as an upstream bug, which the user rejected before requesting a workaround.
brief_summary: User wanted to track down hook errors; Claude correctly traced them to project-level relative-path hooks and implemented a workaround after some incorrect assumptions and a rejected recommendation.
